zh.Beaucé, Ille-Et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Franc: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉波奧瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Dreux於1264年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉波奧瑟時，她的父親Robert de Dreux47歲，母親Isabelle de Villebéon25歲。她於1281年與Gaucher V de Châtillon結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年4月19日在法國享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Dreux于1264年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉波奧瑟时，她的父亲Robert de Dreux47岁，母亲Isabelle de Villebéon25岁。她于1281年与Gaucher V de Châtillon结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年4月19日在法国享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Dreux was born in 1264, in Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Robert de Dreux, was 47 and her mother, Isabelle de Villebéon, was 25. She married Gaucher V de Châtillon in 1281. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 19 April 1300, in France, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Dreux est née en 1264, à Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Robert de Dreux, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Villebéon, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Gaucher V de Châtillon en 1281. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1300, à France, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Dreux 1264 in Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Dreux 47 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Villebéon 25. Sie hat 1281 Gaucher V de Châtillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. April 1300 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Dreux è nata il nel 1264 nel Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Dreux, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Villebéon, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Gaucher V de Châtillon nel 1281. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1300, nel Francia, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Beaucé, Ille-Et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Franc: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインビーウクe
ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Dreuxが1264年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインビーウクeで生まれた時，父Robert de Dreuxは47歳，母Isabelle de Villebéonは25歳であった。1281年にGaucher V de Châtillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年4月19日にフランスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Dreux(이)가 1264년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 보ce에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Dreux(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Villebéon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1281년 Gaucher V de Châtillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 4월 19일 프랑스에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Dreux nasceu em 1264, em Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Robert de Dreux, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Villebéon, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Gaucher V de Châtillon em 1281. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1300, em França, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Dreux родилась в 1264 г. в местности бокe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Dreux было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Villebéon, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gaucher V de Châtillon в 1281 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 апреля 1300 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 36 лет.

sm.from 1283 to 1295: mai le 1283 e o'o I le 1295

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Dreux nació en 1264, en Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Robert de Dreux, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Villebéon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Gaucher V de Châtillon en 1281. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1300, en Francia, a la edad de 36 años.
